notes: Self-contained infrastructure file adding MvPowerSeries.pderiv (multivariate formal derivative) which is absent from Mathlib; strong candidate for upstream contribution. The Leibniz rule proof uses a Finset.sum_nbij' reindexing of antidiagonal sums, and pderiv_subst proves the chain rule by a density+continuity extension (polynomials dense in power series under Pi topology). Downstream use is Silverman IV.4.2 (formal group invariant differential), consumed by HasseWeil/FormalGroup/Differential.lean.
